title: Rice & Paddy Farmer
description: Cultivates rice and paddy fields; manages irrigation, planting, harvesting with manual and basic mechanized tools. Work is entirely physical, seasonal, and location-bound within rural Bangladesh.

title: Vegetable & Horticulture Farmer
description: Grows vegetables and fruits for domestic market. Involves manual labour, field preparation, irrigation. Operates in rural areas.

title: Jute Cultivation & Processing Worker
description: Grows, harvests, and processes jute fibre. Highly manual, physically demanding, weather-dependent work in rural Bangladesh.

title: Fisherman (Inland & Coastal)
description: Catches fish using nets, traps and boats in rivers, ponds and the Bay of Bengal. Entirely physical, location-bound work requiring knowledge of local waterways.

title: Poultry & Livestock Farmer
description: Raises chickens, ducks, cattle and goats. Daily hands-on feeding, healthcare, and management. Physically intensive and location-specific.

title: Agricultural Day Laborer
description: Performs seasonal wage labour including planting, weeding, harvesting. No fixed employer; highly physical and unstructured.

title: Shrimp & Aquaculture Farmer
description: Manages shrimp ghers (brackish ponds) particularly in coastal Khulna and Bagerhat districts. Physical monitoring, feeding, and harvesting.

title: RMG Sewing Machine Operator
description: Operates industrial sewing machines in garment factories to stitch fabric panels. Highly repetitive, physically present on factory floor. Requires manual dexterity and speed.

title: RMG Quality Control Inspector
description: Inspects finished garments for defects, dimensions, and stitching quality. Works on factory floor with physical inspection of materials. Uses basic digital checklists.

title: RMG Fabric Cutting Worker
description: Operates cutting machines and scissors to cut fabric patterns. Physical, precise manual work in garment factories.

title: RMG Production Supervisor / Line Chief
description: Oversees a production line of 20-50 sewing operators. Manages targets, quality, and attendance. Some use ERP systems for reporting.

title: Textile Mill Spinner / Weaver
description: Operates spinning or weaving machinery in textile mills. Physical machine operation; fixed factory location.

title: Construction / Civil Works Laborer
description: Performs manual labour on building and infrastructure projects—brick laying, concrete mixing, scaffolding. Entirely physical and site-bound.

title: Mason & Carpenter (Construction)
description: Skilled tradesperson constructing and finishing buildings. Manual craft requiring physical presence on site.

title: Electrician & Plumber (Building Services)
description: Installs and maintains electrical wiring and plumbing systems in buildings. Hands-on, site-specific technical work.

title: Factory Machine Operator (General)
description: Operates production machinery in pharmaceuticals, food processing, ceramics, or steel sectors. Physical presence required.

title: Shipbuilding & Repair Worker
description: Works in Dhaka and Chittagong shipyards on vessel construction and repair. Heavy manual and technical work.

title: Retail Shop Worker / Salesperson
description: Works in markets (bazaar), shops, or malls serving customers, stocking shelves and handling cash. Involves local human interaction. Basic digital POS in larger stores.

title: Rickshaw / Van Puller
description: Provides cycle-rickshaw or van transportation in urban and peri-urban areas. Entirely physical, location-bound work.

title: Ride-Sharing Driver (Pathao / Shohoz)
description: Provides motorcycle taxi or car ride-hailing through apps like Pathao or Shohoz. Uses smartphone app to accept rides but work is physical driving.

title: Truck / Bus / Tempo Driver
description: Drives freight trucks or passenger buses on road networks. Physical driving requiring local navigation expertise.

title: Hotel, Restaurant & Food Service Worker
description: Prepares and serves food and beverages. Physically present in kitchens and dining areas. Requires in-person customer service.

title: Domestic Worker / Household Help
description: Performs household chores including cooking, cleaning, and childcare in private homes. Entirely physical and in-person.

title: Mobile Banking Agent (bKash / Nagad)
description: Operates mobile financial service point for cash in/out, transfers. Uses smartphone app but requires physical customer interaction for cash handling.

title: Microfinance Field Officer (NGO/MFI)
description: Visits rural clients weekly for loan disbursement and collection for organizations like Grameen Bank, BRAC, ASA. Mostly field-based with mobile app support.

title: Pharmacy Salesperson / Drug Dispenser
description: Sells prescription and OTC medicines from pharmacy. Requires local presence and basic product knowledge. Limited digitization.

title: Beauty Salon & Barber Worker
description: Provides haircuts, beauty treatments, and grooming services. Entirely physical and human-contact-dependent.

title: Software Engineer / Developer
description: Designs, codes, tests, and deploys software applications. Work product is entirely digital—code, documentation, APIs. Can work remotely. Heavily uses AI coding tools.

title: Data Analyst / Business Analyst
description: Collects, processes, and analyses data to generate reports and dashboards for business decisions. Digital work product—SQL, Python, Excel, BI tools.

title: IT Support & Helpdesk Technician
description: Provides technical support for hardware and software. Mix of remote troubleshooting and physical presence for hardware issues.

title: Freelance Digital Worker (Upwork/Fiverr)
description: Provides digital services—graphic design, content writing, data entry, web development—through online platforms. Work is entirely digital and remoteable.

title: Bank Officer / Financial Analyst
description: Processes loans, manages accounts, conducts financial analysis. Primarily digital work using banking software but requires in-person client interaction for KYC.

title: BCS Administration Officer (Govt.)
description: Manages administrative functions, policy implementation, and public service delivery. Mix of document processing, citizen interaction, and field visits.

title: Primary School Teacher
description: Teaches children aged 6-11 in primary schools. Physically present in classroom. Minimal digital tools in rural areas; some digital content in urban schools.

title: Secondary & Higher Secondary Teacher
description: Teaches grades 6-12. Growing use of digital content and online tutoring. Core role is in-classroom instruction.

title: University / College Professor
description: Conducts lectures, research, and academic publishing. Growing digital output—papers, course content, LMS. Research work is highly digital.

title: Medical Doctor (MBBS / Specialist)
description: Diagnoses and treats patients. Core work requires physical examination and in-person consultation. Some telehealth emerging.

title: Nurse & Paramedic
description: Provides bedside patient care, administers medication, monitors vitals. Entirely physical and requires presence in healthcare facilities.

title: Journalist / Media Professional
description: Reports, writes, and edits news content for TV, newspaper, or online platforms. Work product is digital text and video. Research and writing can be done remotely.

title: Accountant / Auditor
description: Prepares financial statements, tax returns, and audit reports. Work is primarily digital—spreadsheets, accounting software (Tally, SAP).

title: Lawyer / Legal Professional
description: Provides legal advice, drafts contracts, argues cases. Mix of document preparation (digital) and physical court appearances.

title: NGO & Development Worker
description: Manages development programs, conducts surveys, facilitates community meetings. Mix of field work and digital report writing. Bangladesh has largest NGO sector globally.

title: Civil & Electrical Engineer (Formal Sector)
description: Designs and supervises infrastructure and power projects. Mix of digital (AutoCAD, design software) and on-site supervision.

title: Call Center / BPO Agent
description: Handles inbound/outbound calls and digital chats for customer service. Work product is entirely conversational and digital.

title: Overseas Migrant Worker (Gulf/Malaysia)
description: Works abroad in construction, cleaning, domestic service, manufacturing primarily in Saudi Arabia, UAE, Malaysia, Qatar. Physically demanding roles in foreign countries.

title: Garments Merchandiser / Export Officer
description: Coordinates between buyers and factories on orders, quality, and shipment. Uses email, spreadsheets, ERP systems. Mix of digital coordination and factory floor visits.
